tasks.acceptance_criteria: Change Events list supports Procore parity columns/groups for revenue and cost fields or documented product decision with owner/date.
Orchestrator defines canonical phase-level verification command defaults and required output capture for each phase.
VERIFY_IMPLEMENTATION references deterministic command path for screenshot/video/DB checks in one place.
Waiver metadata requires owner, approver, rationale, and expiry/review date.
Change-event conversion endpoint naming is consistent in comments/docs/routes.
